name: Chicken & Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 6 asparagus spears, washed and sliced into 2-3 inch lengths
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten each chicken breast and season to taste.
2. Sprinkle a little mozzarella cheese on one end of each breast.
3. Lay one asparagus spear crosswise on top, then roll the breast up and secure with toothpicks (use more if needed so they fit side by side). The mozzarella should be at the center only.
4. Repeat for all breasts.
5. Heat a lightly oiled frypan and sauté the rolls until browned.
6. Pour marinara sauce over everything and simmer, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking, until the chicken is cooked through.
7. Serve over rice or pasta. Warn guests about the toothpicks before serving.
